title: The Little Red Hen

segments.text: Once upon a time, a little red hen found some wheat.
Who will help me plant it?
Then I will do it myself, she said.
She planted, watered, and cut the wheat.
Who will help me eat it?
No, said the little red hen.
I will eat it all by myself.

transcript: Once upon a time, a little red hen found some wheat. Who will help me plant it? she asked. Not I, said the cat. Not I, said the dog. Then I will do it myself, she said. She planted, watered, and cut the wheat. She baked the bread. Who will help me eat it? she asked. I will, said the cat. I will, said the dog. No, said the little red hen. I will eat it all by myself. And she did.
